Precision Color & Measurement Tools

Professional-grade color picking and accurate measurement tools for design and technical work

Live Color Picker

Pick any color from your PDF with magnifying glass precision. Copy HEX, RGB values instantly with color history.

  • Real-time magnifier
  • Color history (last 8 colors)
  • Copy HEX/RGB with one click
Free

Advanced Color Tools

Professional color manipulation with gradient generation and color scheme extraction.

  • Color scheme generator
  • Gradient creator
  • Color blind simulator
Premium

Distance Measurement

● ← 125px → ●

Area Measurement

Calculate areas of rectangles, polygons, and complex shapes. Perfect for floor plans and layouts.

  • Polygon area calculation
  • Rectangle/ square measure
  • Export measurements
Premium

✨ Unlock All 40+ Pro Tools

Get lifetime access to all premium tools with a one-time purchase

How to Edit Text in PDF
Simple 4-step process - Click, Type, Format, Save!
Step 1
1️⃣ Click the "Open PDF" button to load the document
Upload your PDF and get ready to edit instantly.
Step 2
2️⃣ Select any text you want to edit
Click on any text in the PDF to open the edit dialog.
Step 3
3️⃣ Type your new text
Edit the text easily with real-time preview.
Step 4
4️⃣ Click the "Save" button after editing
Apply changes with support for font, size, color, bold, italic.
Step 5
5️⃣ Click the "Save PDF" button
Finalize your edits and prepare the document for download.
Step 6
6️⃣ Download your edited PDF
Your updated PDF will be downloaded instantly.
